title: Tujhe Dekha To Yeh Jana Sanam

lines.lyrics: Tujhee dekhaa too yeh jaanaa sanamm
lines.indian: Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha(k) Ga Re Ga Sa Re Ma Ga.
Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha(k) Ga Re Ga. Sa Re Sa Ni(k).

lines.lyrics: Tujhee dekhaa too yeh jaanaa sanamm
lines.indian: Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha(k) Ga Re Ga Sa Re Ma Ga.
Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha(k) Ga Re Ga. Sa Re Sa Ni(k).

lines.lyrics: Abb yahaann see kahaa jaayee humm
lines.indian: Dha(k) n.p.d Ni(k) p.d Sa Ni(k)

lines.lyrics: Terii bahoo mee marr jaayee humm
lines.indian: Ni(k) Sa Re Pa Ma Ga Sa Re. Ga Re Sa Ni(k) Dha(k).
